title: Snapshot extension: capture-safe, public-only, manifest-cached framework + /db-query port
kind: framework (a dedicated rosetta-extensions section + the data-DNA snapshot dimension + corpus spec + /db-query port)

tests.race: both Go modules pass go test ./... -race
tests.flake_gate: 0 failures across 5x shuffled sequential runs of both modules

coverage.note: harden ran 2 passes (recorded in progress.md); deltas <2% on every touched file at stop

by_package_after_harden.pg: 52.5% (rest is irreducibly live-DB Conn methods behind the interface seam)

delivered.extension: rosetta-extensions/stack-snapshot/ — 9 Go pkgs (manifest/firewall/source/store/pg/capture/replay/reference + cmd/stacksnap) + README handbook; tagged stack-snapshot-m9a (re-pointed to HEAD 1cc4dd2 at close)
delivered.data_dna: stack-seeding/dna/snapshot.go — snapshot-seeded status (counts toward coverage) + 5 snapshot-fidelity operators (row-count/structural/referential/embedding-dim/public-only)
delivered.corpus: corpus/ops/snapshot-spec.md (new) + corpus/ops/db-access.md (capture-source policy) + the alignment_testing.md snapshot-fidelity dimension

safety.tenant_firewall: firewall.AssertPublicOnly — plan-time + post-capture, hard-fail on any tenant row; capture stashes payloads in-memory until ALL tables pass (nothing persisted on a leak)
safety.capture_source_policy: M9a-D3 precedence: cache-hit -> dump-ingest [default] -> safe primary read [MVCC] -> restore/replica [AWS-gated upgrades]; bounded read-only session
safety.replay_integrity: every payload SHA-256 verified before the first row is written (fail-before-write)
safety.path_traversal: store.sanitize (Ref keys, ..-collapse-to-fixpoint) + safeFilename (payloads); FuzzSanitize found no escape

review.findings_detail: tag stack-snapshot-m9a trailed HEAD by 3 harden commits (test-only); re-pointed + force-pushed at close

review.docs: GREEN — accurate, handbook indexed, all cross-references resolve
review.adversarial: 5 scenarios recorded in decisions.md, all Fate-1-handled in shipped code
